mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tiktok_campaigns WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM tiktok_campaigns WHERE campaign_id = #{campaignId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM tiktok_campaigns WHERE advertiser_id = #{advertiserId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM tiktok_campaigns ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE tiktok_campaigns SET campaign_name = #{campaignName}, objective = #{objective}, budget = #{budget}, budget_mode = #{budgetMode}, operation_status = #{operationStatus}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tiktok_campaigns SET operation_status = #{operationStatus}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE campaign_id = #{campaignId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tiktok_campaigns ( advertiser_id, campaign_id, campaign_name, objective, budget, budget_mode, operation_status ) VALUES
(#{item.advertiserId}, #{item.campaignId}, #{item.campaignName}, #{item.objective}, #{item.budget}, #{item.budgetMode}, #{item.operationStatus})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE campaign_name = VALUES(campaign_name), objective = VALUES(objective), budget = VALUES(budget), budget_mode = VALUES(budget_mode), operation_status = VALUES(operation_status), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
